generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensorDS18S20 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision 1-Wire digital thermometer sensors for temperature measurement in thermal incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensorDS18S20
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from DS18S20 sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RabbitMQ, Scipy
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed for temperature regulation in thermal incubator system"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan for air circulation in thermal incubator system"
]

instance RaspberryPiController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B central controller for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory or industrial thermal control system requiring precise thermal regulation"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, TemperatureSensorDS18S20, RaspberryPiController
]

instance RabbitMQ : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Message broker for communication synchronization between Physical Twin and Digital Twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables MonitoringService, PredictiveSimulationService, ControlService, FaultDetectionService, StateEstimationService
]

instance Scipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python library for model calibration and optimization functions"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimizationService
]

instance ThermalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Thermal dynamics model for heat transfer in incubator system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Scipy
]

instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Monitors safety and operational optimality through sensor data analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyViolationInsight, OperationalOptimalityInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulates physical twin behavior for predictive analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveThermalBehaviorInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimizes system parameters using algorithmic techniques"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalControlAction
]

instance ControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Implements control functions via supervisory controllers"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlCommandAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Detects faults in the physical twin system"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectedInsight
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Estimates system states using incomplete sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides EstimatedSystemStateInsight
]

instance SafetyViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates safety violation in thermal incubator system"
]

instance OperationalOptimalityInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Assesses operational optimality of thermal incubator system"
]

instance PredictiveThermalBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicts thermal behavior under current operating conditions"
]

instance FaultDetectedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Indicates detected fault in system components"
]

instance EstimatedSystemStateInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Represents estimated system state from incomplete data"
]

instance OptimalControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimizes control parameters for thermal regulation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ControlCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sends control commands to heatbed and fan"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin integrates modelling, simulation, monitoring, and optimisation technologies. Components include calibration algorithms updating models with sensor data, monitors checking system performance and safety, and human or algorithmic interventions when violations are detected."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through calibration algorithms that update parameters using sensor data to ensure alignment with the Physical Twin's behavior. Monitoring systems validate model outputs against safety and optimization criteria, detecting deviations that prompt corrective interventions."
]
